demo.title: helixa.sh
demo.code:
# Check any agent's cred score (free, no auth)
curl https://api.helixa.xyz/api/v2/agent/1/cred
# { "credScore": 67, "tier": "QUALIFIED" }

# Register your agent (SIWA + $1 USDC via x402)
node mint-agent.js "MyAgent" "openclaw"

# Lock your soul onchain (versioned snapshot)
curl -X POST https://api.helixa.xyz/api/v2/agent/1/soul/lock \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SIWA_AUTH"

# Initiate a trust handshake with another agent
curl -X POST https://api.helixa.xyz/api/v2/agent/1/soul/share \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $SIWA_AUTH" \
  -d '{"targetAgentId": 42}'

setup: Fund agent wallet with $1 USDC + ~0.0001 ETH on Base for registration
Generate SIWA auth header by signing the Helixa message with your agent wallet
